elements.title: lang::report_page_060_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.username,
       kbi_u.idnumber,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_m.name                               AS mod_name,
       kbi_cm.id                                AS instance_id,
       kbi_ul.timeaccess,
       kbi_ue.status,
       kbi_ue.timeend,
       GREATEST(
         COALESCE(kbi_ass.submitted, 0), COALESCE(f.posted, 0), COALESCE(q.started, 0), COALESCE(gl.submitted, 0),
         COALESCE(ch.submitted, 0)
           )                                AS overal_submission_date,
       GREATEST(
         COALESCE(kbi_ass.graded, 0), COALESCE(q.graded, 0)
           )                                AS overal_submission_graded,
       GREATEST(
         COALESCE(kbi_ass.grade, 0), COALESCE(q.grade, 0)
           )                                AS overal_submission_grade,
       teachers.teacher
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ul ON kbi_ul.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_ul.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid,
                         GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) SEPARATOR 'sql') AS teacher
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                         JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid) AS teachers ON teachers.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ass.userid,
                         kbi_ass.assignment,
                         MAX(kbi_ass.timemodified) AS submitted,
                         MAX(kbi_ag.grade)         AS grade,
                         MAX(kbi_ag.timemodified)  AS graded
                  FROM mdl_assign_submission kbi_ass
                         JOIN mdl_assign kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_ass.assignment AND kbi_m.course = :courseid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_ag ON kbi_ag.assignment = kbi_ass.assignment AND kbi_ag.userid = kbi_ass.userid
                  WHERE kbi_ass.status = 'submitted'
                  GROUP BY kbi_ass.userid, kbi_ass.assignment) ass
         ON kbi_ass.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_ass.assignment = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_m.name = 'assign'
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_fd.forum, kbi_fp.userid, MAX(kbi_fp.modified) AS posted, NULL AS grade, NULL AS graded
                  FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd
                         JOIN mdl_forum kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_fd.forum AND kbi_m.course = :courseid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp ON kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
                  GROUP BY kbi_fd.forum, kbi_fp.userid) f ON f.userid = kbi_u.id AND f.forum = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_m.name = 'forum'
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_qa.quiz,
                         kbi_qa.userid,
                         MIN(kbi_qa.timestart)     AS started,
                         MAX(kbi_qgr.grade)        AS grade,
                         MAX(kbi_qgr.timemodified) AS graded
                  FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa
                         JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_qa.quiz AND kbi_m.course = :courseid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_quiz_grades kbi_qgr ON kbi_qgr.quiz = kbi_m.id AND kbi_qgr.userid = kbi_qa.userid
                  GROUP BY kbi_qa.quiz, kbi_qa.userid) q ON q.userid = kbi_u.id AND q.quiz = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_m.name = 'quiz'
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ge.glossaryid, kbi_ge.userid, MAX(kbi_ge.timecreated) AS submitted, NULL AS grade, NULL AS graded
                  FROM mdl_glossary_entries kbi_ge
                         JOIN mdl_glossary kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_ge.glossaryid AND kbi_m.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_ge.glossaryid, kbi_ge.userid) gl
         ON gl.userid = kbi_u.id AND gl.glossaryid = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_m.name = 'glossary'
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ca.choiceid, kbi_ca.userid, MAX(kbi_ca.timemodified) AS submitted, NULL AS grade, NULL AS graded
                  FROM mdl_choice_answers kbi_ca
                         JOIN mdl_choice kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_ca.choiceid AND kbi_m.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_ca.choiceid, kbi_ca.userid) ch
         ON ch.userid = kbi_u.id AND ch.choiceid = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_m.name = 'choice'
WHERE kbi_ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
